Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}But the first door didn't disappear. It just opened up to a new place...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Never mind that. What we just saw was...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}...That sure brings back memories.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}All I thought of back then was finding my mom's murderer, but in the end, I couldn't manage it on my own.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}All I could do was ask myself why he had special powers... and if things would've turned out differently if I had them, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 10 25 25}Maybe that night... was the reason I started experiencing the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 10 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}My family must have fabricated the "accident" as a cover-up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Hey, Metis! What was that all about!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Apparently, we can only witness past events if not everyone was involved in the first place... That's new.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 8 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}That's not what I meant! Why did we see such a painful memory!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Huh? How would I know? It's your past.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You better not be hiding anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}How would I benefit from that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}This is just speculation, but I think the doors reflect the minds of those who pass through.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}That's why we were able to find a place to acquire supplies and return to the dorm directly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Right now, you wish to erase the Abyss of Time as soon as possible and make it out alive, correct?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}If so, then although what's beyond these doors may seem irrelevant, there might be a reason we're seeing it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Perhaps your time would be better spent thinking about that reason rather than accusing me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}It's all right, really. What she's saying... is probably true.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}I've been doing a lot of thinking lately...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Back then, things weren't perfect, but everything seemed so much more... straightforward, when we were fighting.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}That feeling we all shared just wasn't something you can get by going to school every day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Sanada-san, recently you've dedicated yourself to boxing again, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Isn't that because... you don't want to forget that feeling?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Why don't we just drop the subject?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}There's no point in dredging up the past...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}Don't you remember why we put everything on the line?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}If we stop moving forward, then this all would be a waste of time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For what reason did we witness[n]a vision of our friend's past...?[n]{f 1 1}
